items.title: In just 3 weeks, StrictlyVC is coming to Los Angeles
items.summary: StrictlyVC Los Angeles is on June 18. Join for meaningful networking and fireside chats with leaders from Mach Industries, Shinkei Systems, and more. Register today.

items.title: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool
items.summary: The new Opus model comes with a tool called Dynamic Workflows, for coordinating swarms of subagents.

items.title: Anthropic launches Opus 4.8, with honesty as its killer feature
items.summary: Anthropic's latest Claude model isn't just faster or smarter. Opus 4.8 is being pitched as more honest, more careful, and better suited to complex coding projects.

items.title: Claude’s new model is more ‘honest’ when it messes up
items.summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Opus 4.8 on Thursday, and the company is touting the model's "honesty." items.title: How DeepSeek’s radical architecture is shattering Silicon Valley's token moat

items.title: Here’s where you can preorder the new Oura Ring 5
items.summary: If you’ve been waiting for a smaller version of the Oura Ring, the company’s latest wearable is now available for preorder ahead of its June 4th release from Oura and various third-party retailers, including both Amazon and Walmart. items.title: IBM će uložiti deset milijardi USD u kvantna računala
items.summary: Nova investicija obuhvatit će istraživanje i razvoj, kapitalna ulaganja, partnerstva u ekosustavu, skaliranje proizvodnje te spajanja i akvizicije.

items.title: A $2,000 AI-generated film will make its debut at Tribeca
items.summary: Next month's Tribeca Festival will include the premiere of an AI-generated film: Dreams of Violets. items.title: Call of Duty: Warzone is dropping PS4 and Xbox One support later this year
items.summary: Activision is planning to drop support for PS4 and Xbox One consoles in Call of Duty: Warzone later this year. items.summary: It may be a generation behind, but the LG C5 OLED TV still offers plenty of reasons to pick one up, especially at this price.

items.title: How to force Google AI Overviews to prioritize your favorite news sources
items.summary: Google's Preferred Sources feature is now available in AI Overviews and AI Mode, so you can add your favorite sites to your AI-powered searches.

items.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary.
items.summary: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

items.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
items.summary: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.

items.title: The secret to Roku’s success: not being cool
